channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SBIN] SBI Declares ₹17.35 Dividend for FY 2024-25
item.description:
State Bank of India (SBI) has declared a dividend of ₹17.35 per equity share (1735%) for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The record date for determining eligibility for the dividend is May 16, 2026. The register of shareholders will be closed from May 17, 2026, to May 19, 2026, for dividend payment. The dividend payment date is fixed as June 4, 2026.

  • SBI declares ₹17.35 dividend per share for FY 2024-25.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is May 16, 2026.
  • Shareholder register closed from May 17-19, 2026 for dividend payment.
  • Dividend payment date is set for June 4, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STATE BANK OF INDIA | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SWIGGY] Swiggy Ltd Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Swiggy Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (consolidated and standalone) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Auditors’ Report with an unmodified opinion on the financial results is attached. The board meeting was held on May 08, 2026, commencing at 2:45 p.m. and concluding at 3:40 p.m. IST.

  • Swiggy Ltd approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • Auditors' Report with unmodified opinion is attached.
  • Meeting held on May 08, 2026, to approve the results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Swiggy Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JSWINFRA] JSW Infra Recommends ₹0.90 Dividend, Approves FY26 Results
item.description:
JSW Infrastructure Ltd's board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial statements and results for the year ended March 31, 2026. A dividend of ₹0.90 per equity share was recommended for FY26. The board also approved the appointment of M/s. Kishore Bhatia and Associates as Cost Auditor and Mr. Haresh Dua as Internal Auditor for FY27. The meeting concluded at 3:15 p.m.

  • Approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • Recommended a dividend of ₹0.90 per share for FY26.
  • Appointed M/s. Kishore Bhatia as Cost Auditor for FY27.
  • Appointed Mr. Haresh Dua as Internal Auditor for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JSW Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BHILSPIN] Bhilwara Spinners Board Meeting on May 15, 2026
item.description:
Bhilwara Spinners Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 15, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will be held at the company's registered office. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until May 18, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 15, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 18, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHILWARA SPINNERS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CSL] Continental Securities Approves FY26 Audited Results; Dividend
item.description:
Continental Securities Ltd approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, in a board meeting held on May 08, 2026. The board recommended a final dividend of ₹0.05 (2.5%) per equity share (Face value of ₹2 each), subject to shareholder approval. The company's revenue from operations for the year ended March 31, 2026, stood at ₹393.80 lakhs, with a profit after tax of ₹219.03 lakhs. Trading window will open after 48 hours of the results being made public.

  • Audited FY26 results approved with revenue from operations at ₹393.80 lakhs.
  • Final dividend of ₹0.05 per share (2.5%) recommended for FY26.
  • Profit after tax for FY26 reported at ₹219.03 lakhs.
  • Board meeting concluded on May 08, 2026; trading window opens after 48 hours.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Continental Securities Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ISGEC] ISGEC: JV Share Sale Results in Subsidiary Status Change
item.description:
ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd has sold 5,00,000 equity shares (25%) in its joint venture company, Isgec SFW Boilers Private Limited, to Sumitomo SHI FW Energia OY for ₹4 crores. This reduces ISGEC's shareholding to 26%, causing Isgec SFW Boilers to cease being a subsidiary and become an associate company. The sale agreement was entered on May 08, 2026, with an expected completion date of June 30, 2026. Isgec SFW Boilers contributed 0.18% of consolidated turnover and 0.29% of net worth in FY25.

  • ISGEC sells 25% stake in Isgec SFW Boilers to Sumitomo for ₹4 crores.
  • Shareholding in JV reduces to 26%, changing status to associate.
  • Transaction expected to be completed by June 30, 2026.
  • Isgec SFW Boilers' FY25 turnover contribution was 0.18%.
  • Isgec SFW Boilers' FY25 net worth contribution was 0.29%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd | Category: Divestment

item.title: [ICIL] Indo Count Reappoints Ambika Sharma as Director
item.description:
Indo Count Industries Ltd's Board of Directors re-appointed Mrs. Ambika Sharma as a Non-Executive Independent Director for a second term of five years, effective from May 27, 2026, to May 26, 2031. This decision, made on May 8, 2026, is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming General Meeting. Mrs. Sharma's profile includes over three decades of experience in public affairs and international relations, with roles at FICCI and the U.S.-India Business Council.

  • Ambika Sharma re-appointed as Non-Executive Independent Director.
  • Second term is for five years, effective May 27, 2026 to May 26, 2031.
  • Re-appointment is subject to shareholder approval.
  • Mrs. Sharma has extensive experience in international business and public affairs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDO COUNT INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [LEMONTREE] Lemon Tree Hotels Opens Keys Select in Amritsar, Adds Rooms
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd has announced the opening of Keys Select by Lemon Tree Hotels in Amritsar. The hotel features 50 well-appointed rooms, an increase from the previously disclosed 45 rooms. The property includes a restaurant, meeting room, and fitness center. This launch strengthens Lemon Tree's presence in North India and caters to the city's tourism and pilgrimage demand, being located near the Golden Temple and Jallianwala Bagh.

  • Keys Select by Lemon Tree Hotels opens in Amritsar with 50 rooms.
  • The hotel is located near the Golden Temple and Jallianwala Bagh.
  • The property includes a restaurant, meeting room, and fitness center.
  • This opening strengthens Lemon Tree's footprint in North India.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [SWIGGY] Swiggy Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Swiggy Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (consolidated and standalone) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, during its meeting held on May 08, 2026. The Auditors’ Report with an unmodified opinion on the financial results is attached. The meeting commenced at IST 2:45 p.m. and concluded at IST 3:40 p.m. The information is available on the company's website.

  • Swiggy's board approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • The results are consolidated and standalone.
  • Auditors' report with unmodified opinion is attached.
  • Meeting was held on May 08, 2026.
  • Results are available on Swiggy's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Swiggy Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KSL] Kalyani Steels Appoints Bantu Upendra Kumar Patro as CFO
item.description:
Kalyani Steels Ltd announced the appointment of Mr. Bantu Upendra Kumar Patro as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) effective May 9, 2026. This decision was made based on the recommendations of the Audit Committee and the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. The company also declared audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, recommending a dividend of ₹10 per equity share. Additionally, Mr. Shishir Joshipura was appointed as an Additional Independent Director for a term of four years, subject to member approval.

  • Bantu Upendra Kumar Patro appointed as Chief Financial Officer, effective May 9, 2026.
  • Board recommends a dividend of ₹10 per share for FY 2025-26, subject to member approval.
  • Shishir Joshipura appointed as Additional Independent Director for four years, pending approval.
  • Kalyani Steels' Board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Revenue from Operations for the year ended March 31, 2026 stood at ₹18,456.07 Million.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KALYANI STEELS LTD. | Category: Management Change
